basic_details.short_information: Steel Authority of India (SAIL) Consultant (Specialists & GDMO) Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website sail.co.in. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the SAIL Consultant (Specialists & GDMO) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts.

qualification.details: Orthopaedics: MBBS with PG Diploma/Degree in respective speciality Anaesthesia: MBBS with PG Diploma/Degree in respective speciality Paediatrics: MBBS with PG Diploma/Degree in respective speciality GDMO: MBBS

salary_details.details: Orthopaedics, Anaesthesia, Paediatrics: ₹ 1,20,000/- or ₹ 1,60,000/- Per Month GDMO: ₹ 90,000/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: SAIL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SAIL Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SAIL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: SAIL Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Orthopaedics: MBBS with PG Diploma/Degree in respective speciality Anaesthesia: MBBS with PG Diploma/Degree in respective speciality Paediatrics: MBBS with PG Diploma/Degree in respective speciality GDMO: MBBS

content_sections.heading: SAIL Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: SAIL Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Orthopaedics, Anaesthesia, Paediatrics: ₹ 1,20,000/- or ₹ 1,60,000/- Per Month GDMO: ₹ 90,000/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for SAIL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SAIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for SAIL Consultant (Specialists & GDMO) posts is scheduled for 16th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by SAIL?
faq.answer: Steel Authority of India (SAIL) has announced a total of 9 vacancies for the Consultant (Specialists & GDMO) positions through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the GDMO post?
faq.answer: For the GDMO post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree. For Specialist posts, an MBBS with a PG Diploma/Degree in the respective speciality is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the SAIL Consultant and GDMO posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Consultant (Specialists & GDMO) posts is 69 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant (Specialists & GDMO) posts?
faq.answer: The salary for GDMO posts is ₹ 90,000/- per month. For Specialist posts, the salary is ₹ 1,20,000/- or ₹ 1,60,000/- per month, depending on the specialization.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SAIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these SAIL vacancies?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Consultant (Specialists & GDMO) posts will involve a Walk-in-Interview followed by a Medical Screening.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for SAIL Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the SAIL office in Bokaro, Jharkhand. The exact address and venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Consultant (Specialists & GDMO) positions announced by SAIL are on a contractual basis.
